title: container-tools bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:

- Remove toolbox dependency as it is not shipped on OL.

[1-16]
- amend dependencies for RHEL10
- Resolves: RHEL-92028
